changelog.1.10.8: Fixed: removed +/- buttons from main screen team selector (team management only on team-setup), added black background styling to team-setup screen's team-name section, fixed formation screen unavailable slot tap selection (now detects unavailable source correctly), improved bench spot handling - empty spots stay visible when players placed on field, fixed setupFormation() to create game before showing formation screen (prevents 'no game selected' error), enhanced dropToSidebar() to completely rebuild sidebar with proper event listeners
changelog.1.10.7: Fixed: formation screen sidebar rebuild when players dropped back from field - now properly shows all available players instead of trying to re-enable deleted DOM elements, verified all JavaScript syntax is valid
changelog.1.10.6: Fixed: main screen player counter now updates on team change, team selector moved into black banner line (main and team-setup screens), formation screen unavailable slots are now draggable with event listener reattachment, formation screen bench spots cleared when players placed on field
changelog.1.10.5: Fixed player position capture on creation, separated team player counter ID from main screen counter, added team name banner and team selector to main screen
changelog.1.10.4: Critical fixes: clearAppData now resets multi-team structure, fixed all appState.players references (editPlayer, savePlayerEdit, deletePlayer, recordAction, game tracking), fixed formation screen unavailable slot clearing, added position field to player objects
changelog.1.10.3: Critical fixes: unified player counter on all screens, formation screen player duplication, team management UI reorganization (team selector only on team-setup screen)
changelog.1.10.2: Bug fixes: FormationScreen drag/drop/tap handlers, player counter updates, team switching on all screens, delete team button, 2-team limit
changelog.1.10.1: Bug fixes: handleTeamChange, addNewTeam updateUI, StatisticsService team isolation
changelog.1.10.0: Multi-team functionality - manage distinct teams (U10 men, U9 women, etc)
